case_title: JENSEN CAROL A VS COLEMAN ROBERT L ACADEMIC VP JOHN F KENNEDY UNIV

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY JENSEN CAROL A AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN ROBERT L ACADEMIC VP JOHN F KENNEDY UNIV ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-16-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN ROBERT L ACADEMIC VP JOHN F KENNEDY UNIV
